revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:1 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:1月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 1월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:正月廿八]][[zh:正月廿八]]
{{Not to be confused with|January 28|qq=January 28}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=一月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 1월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar January|qq=}} '''January 28''' is the 28th day of month {{ill|Zhengyue|en|Zhengyue|qid=Q1072983|lt=January (Mutsuki)|1=Zhengyue}} the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|qid=Q1373026|lt=Wadō|1=Wadō (era)}} 5 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|712|en|712|qid=Q23521|lt=Year 712|1=712}} {{ill|March 9|en|March 9|qid=Q2401|lt=March 9|1=March 9}} ) - {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|qid=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}} is completed and presented to {{ill|Empress Genmei|ja|Emperor Genmei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Genmei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 10 (Julian Calendar {{ill|1582|en|1582|qid=Q6719|lt=Year 1582|1=1582}} {{ill|February 20|en|February 20|qid=Q2344|lt=February 20|1=February 20}} ) - Christian daimyōs of Kyushu, {{ill|Ōtomo Sōrin|ja|Otomo Yoshinobu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtomo Sōrin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , {{ill|Arima Harunobu|en|Arima Harunobu|qid=Q1197394|lt=Arima Harunobu|1=Arima Harunobu}} , and {{ill|Ōmura Sumitada|en|Ōmura Sumitada|qid=Q2728800|lt=Ōmura Sumitada|1=Ōmura Sumitada}} , decide to send an envoy to Rome ({{ill|Tenshō embassy to Europe|ja|天正遣欧使節|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenshō embassy to Europe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天正遣欧少年使節|1=Tenshō embassy|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q16663030}} )
== Births == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 14 (Gregorian Calendar {{ill|1586|en|1586|qid=Q6739|lt=Year 1586|1=1586}} {{ill|March 18|en|March 18|qid=Q2422|lt=March 18|1=March 18}} ) - {{ill|Asano Nagaakira|en|Asano Nagaakira|qid=Q761596|lt=Asano Nagamasa|1=Asano Nagaakira}} , lord of {{ill|Ashimori Domain|en|Ashimori Domain|qid=Q10863289|lt=Ashimori Domain|1=Ashimori Domain}} , {{ill|Kishū Domain|en|Kishū Domain|qid=Q1069187|lt=Kishū Domain|1=Kishū Domain}} , and {{ill|Hiroshima Domain|en|Hiroshima Domain|qid=Q1141203|lt=Hiroshima Domain|1=Hiroshima Domain}} (+ {{ill|1632|en|1632|qid=Q6865|lt=Year 1632|1=1632}} ) * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|qid=Q1325419|lt=Genji 2|1=Genji era}} 2 (Gregorian Calendar {{ill|1865|en|1865|qid=Q7708|lt=Year 1865|1=1865}} {{ill|February 23|en|February 23|qid=Q2352|lt=February 23|1=February 23}} ) - {{ill|Horiguchi Kumajirō|ja|堀口九萬一|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horiguchi Kumajirō|1=Horiguchi Kumaichi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6282563}} , {{ill|Diplomat|en|Diplomat|qid=Q193391|lt=Diplomat|1=Diplomat}} (+ {{ill|1945|en|1945|qid=Q5240|lt=Year 1945|1=1945}} )
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|en|Kankō|qid=Q2736722|lt=Kankō|1=Kankō}} 7 (Julian Calendar {{ill|1010|en|1010|qid=Q19237|lt=Year 1010|1=1010}} {{ill|February 14|en|February 14|qid=Q2332|lt=February 14|1=February 14}} ) - {{ill|Fujiwara no Korechika|en|Fujiwara no Korechika|qid=Q5507530|lt=Fujiwara no Korechika|1=Fujiwara no Korechika}} , {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|qid=Q193292|lt=Heian period|1=Heian period}} {{ill|Court noble|ja|Kugyō|1=Kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|1=Kugyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Court noble|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3138036}} (* {{ill|974|en|974|qid=Q23781|lt=Year 974|1=974}} )
== Anniversaries and Annual Events ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|1|27|1|29|12|28|2|1|0128|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
